title: polystichum cuspidatum
intro: Polystichum cuspidatum, also known as Japanese holly fern or Japanese shield fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving rheumatic pain, and supporting digestion. In traditional Chinese medicine, Polystichum cuspidatum is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, where it is typically combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
